title: It’s Probably Nothing - LIVE Tour 2026
summary: This is a promotional announcement for a live tour called 'It's Probably Nothing' featuring Jesse Michels and Chris Ramsay. The tour will cover UAP-related topics including strange sightings, testimonies, and evidence, with shows scheduled in Austin, Texas and Montreal, Canada.

events.description: It's Probably Nothing live tour scheduled for North America including Austin, Texas and Montreal, Canada
